target_audience: Small and medium-sized businesses and professionals who need one easy-to-use solution to create, manage, and sign documents digitally — without relying on complex or costly enterprise software.
positioning_statement: pdfFiller is the only document solution small and medium businesses will ever need — trusted by over 68 million users and backed by more than 1 million ready-to-use templates, from invoices to lease agreements. With built-in AI-powered creation, it enables individuals and teams to edit, fill, sign, and share documents from any device, with no IT setup required. Designed for real-world business scenarios, pdfFiller helps SMBs go completely digital by replacing fragmented tools with a single, intuitive interface — delivering enterprise-grade capabilities without the enterprise price tag.
